platform.name: NovaTech Platform
platform.portfolio: NovaTech Platform is the unified workspace for modern revenue teams — combining CRM, analytics, and AI-powered automation in a single product. It helps B2B companies reduce tool sprawl, accelerate pipeline, and give every rep the context they need to close deals faster.
platform.tagline: One platform. Every revenue motion. Zero context-switching.

pillars.name: Unified Revenue Workspace
pillars.description: Replace a patchwork of point tools with a single workspace where sales, marketing, and CS share the same data, the same pipeline view, and the same AI — no more syncing, no more silos.

pillars.name: AI Copilot for Every Rep
pillars.description: Embedded AI surfaces next-best-action recommendations, auto-drafts emails, summarizes call recordings, and predicts deal risk — so reps spend time selling, not searching.

pillars.name: Revenue Intelligence & Forecasting
pillars.description: Move from gut-feel forecasting to AI-driven pipeline analysis. Identify coverage gaps, spot at-risk deals, and give leadership the confidence to call the number — weeks earlier than before.

pillars.name: Open Integration Ecosystem
pillars.description: 200+ native integrations with tools your team already uses — Slack, LinkedIn, HubSpot, Gong, Outreach, and more. Open API for custom workflows. No rip-and-replace required.

campaignBrief.content: Q3 campaign focus: Drive platform consolidation narrative — target mid-market companies (200–2000 employees) spending on 3+ point solutions. Message: NovaTech replaces the CRM + forecasting + enablement stack at a lower TCO with better outcomes. Key proof points: 2.4x faster ramp, 18% higher win rate, 34% reduction in tools spend.

analytics.name: NovaTech Analytics
analytics.portfolio: NovaTech Analytics turns raw pipeline and customer data into decisions. Built for revenue and ops teams, it delivers real-time dashboards, cohort analysis, and predictive models — without needing a data team to set it up.
analytics.tagline: Revenue clarity for every team, from first touch to renewal.

pillars.name: Self-Serve BI for Revenue Teams
pillars.description: Drag-and-drop dashboards built on your CRM, product, and marketing data. No SQL required. Ops teams set up once; execs and managers explore on their own.

pillars.name: Predictive Pipeline & Churn Models
pillars.description: ML models trained on your historical data predict which deals will close, which accounts are at churn risk, and where expansion opportunities are hiding — before your reps ask.

pillars.name: Connect Any Data Source in Minutes
pillars.description: Native connectors to Salesforce, HubSpot, Marketo, Stripe, Mixpanel, and 80+ more. Automated data refresh. Schema detection. No engineers needed to get your first dashboard live.

campaignBrief.content: Q3 campaign: Target RevOps and Finance buyers at companies 100–500 employees who are stuck in spreadsheet forecasting. Key message: get to accurate revenue predictions in under a week — no data team, no custom engineering. Proof point: customers go from 0 to live dashboard in 4 days on average.
